_publications._publicationTitle: Functional interactions between neurofibromatosis tumor suppressors underlie Schwann cell tumor de-differentiation and treatment resistance.

_contextSnippet: NF95.11b cells with combined loss of NF1 and NF2 were resistant to selumetinib compared to NF1-mutant, NF2-intact NF95.11b cells
details: CRISPRi suppression of NF2 using 2 independent sgRNAs drove selumetinib resistance compared to sgRNA non-targeting controls
